description: Turns raw business data into dashboards, insights, and recommendations.
roadmap: Strengthen SQL joins, aggregations, window functions, and query optimization.
Build two portfolio dashboards using Power BI or Tableau.
Practice storytelling with metrics: problem, insight, recommendation, impact.
Apply to internships or junior analyst roles with project links on your resume.

description: Connects business goals with data, process improvements, and stakeholder decisions.
roadmap: Learn requirements gathering, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
Create one case study showing a business problem and proposed workflow improvement.
Practice SQL basics and dashboard interpretation.
Prepare STAR-format stories for stakeholder and ambiguity questions.

description: Builds and evaluates predictive models for structured, text, or image data.
roadmap: Finish a supervised learning project with clean evaluation metrics.
Learn train-test splits, cross validation, precision, recall, and model explainability.
Publish notebooks with clear README files and reproducible steps.
Practice explaining model tradeoffs in simple business language.

description: Builds production AI features using LLMs, retrieval, prompts, APIs, and evaluation loops.
roadmap: Build an LLM app with retrieval, citations, and clear fallback behavior.
Learn prompt versioning, basic evaluation, latency, and cost tradeoffs.
Package one FastAPI service with Docker and environment-based configuration.
Show a demo video and architecture diagram in the project README.

description: Creates responsive user interfaces and connects them to backend APIs.
roadmap: Build three polished React screens using reusable components.
Practice API loading, error, and empty states.
Learn accessibility basics for forms, buttons, focus, and color contrast.
Deploy one project and add screenshots to your portfolio.

description: Designs APIs, database models, and server-side business logic.
roadmap: Build REST endpoints with validation, error handling, and tests.
Practice database modeling for users, resumes, and recommendations.
Add authentication and protected routes to one project.
Write API docs and include sample requests in your README.

description: Uses product data to understand user behavior and guide product decisions.
roadmap: Study funnels, retention, cohorts, activation, and engagement metrics.
Build one product analysis case study from a public dataset.
Learn A/B testing basics and common experiment mistakes.
Practice presenting insights with recommendation-first storytelling.

description: Automates product quality checks across APIs and user interfaces.
roadmap: Write API tests for a simple FastAPI project.
Automate two key browser flows with Playwright or Selenium.
Learn clear bug reports with steps, expected result, and actual result.
Add tests to CI so they run on every commit.
